---
title: "\'Householders\'"
---

## \'Householders\'

**By Charlotte Mary Yonge**

**Published:** 1856-1860
**Genre:** Non-fiction, natural history
**Format:** articles in journal

**Publisher:** <i>Magazine for the Young</i> (January 1856-August 1860)

### Notes

A series of articles on shells.

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
